659: /* ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
660:    4. RETRY OPERATIONS
661: ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── */
662: 
663: async function retryEmbedding(
664:   id: number,
665:   content: string,
666:   claimedPreviousStatus: RetryQueueStatus | null = null,
667: ): Promise<RetryResult> {
668:   const db = vectorIndex.getDb();
669:   if (!db) return { success: false, error: 'Database not initialized. Server may still be starting up.' };
670: 
671:   const now = new Date().toISOString();
672: 
673:   try {
674:     const memory = vectorIndex.getMemory(id);
675:     if (!memory) return { success: false, error: 'Memory not found' };
676:     const previousStatus = claimedPreviousStatus ?? (
677:       typeof memory.embedding_status === 'string'
678:         ? memory.embedding_status
679:         : typeof (memory as { embeddingStatus?: unknown }).embeddingStatus === 'string'
680:           ? (memory as { embeddingStatus?: string }).embeddingStatus ?? null
681:           : null
682:     );
683: 
684:     if ((memory.retry_count as number) >= MAX_RETRIES) {
685:       markAsFailed(id, 'Maximum retry attempts exceeded');
686:       return { success: false, error: 'Maximum retries exceeded', permanent: true };
687:     }
688: 
689:     // BUG-1 fix: Normalize content before embedding to match sync save path (memory-save.ts:1119).
690:     // Without this, async-saved memories get embeddings from raw markdown (YAML frontmatter, HTML
691:     // Comments, code fences) while sync-saved memories get clean normalized embeddings.
692:     const normalizedContent = normalizeContentForEmbedding(content);
693:     const modelId = getModelName();
694:     const embeddingDim = getEmbeddingDimension();
695:     const contentHash = computeContentHash(normalizedContent);
696:     const cachedEmbedding = lookupEmbedding(db, contentHash, modelId, embeddingDim);
697: 
698:     let embedding: Float32Array | null = null;
699: 
700:     if (cachedEmbedding) {
701:       embedding = new Float32Array(
702:         cachedEmbedding.buffer,
703:         cachedEmbedding.byteOffset,
704:         Math.floor(cachedEmbedding.byteLength / Float32Array.BYTES_PER_ELEMENT),
705:       );
706:     } else {
707:       // Skip API call if provider circuit breaker is open
708:       if (isProviderCircuitOpen()) {
709:         return { success: false, error: 'Embedding provider circuit breaker open — skipping API call' };
710:       }
711: 
712:       try {
713:         embedding = await generateDocumentEmbedding(normalizedContent);
714:       } catch (providerError: unknown) {
715:         const sanitizedError = sanitizeAndLogEmbeddingFailure(
716:           `[retry-manager] Embedding retry failed for #${id}`,
717:           providerError,
718:           { provider: modelId, force: true },
719:         ) ?? 'EMBEDDING_PROVIDER_ERROR (provider=unknown, type=provider_error)';
720:         recordProviderFailure();
721:         // Security: raw provider errors sanitized before persistence/response
722:         incrementRetryCount(id, sanitizedError);
723:         return { success: false, error: sanitizedError };
724:       }
725: 
726:       if (embedding) {
727:         recordProviderSuccess();
728:         storeEmbedding(
729:           db,
730:           contentHash,
731:           modelId,
732:           Buffer.from(embedding.buffer, embedding.byteOffset, embedding.byteLength),
733:           embedding.length,
734:         );
735:       } else {
736:         recordProviderFailure();
737:       }
738:     }
739: 
740:     if (!embedding) {
741:       incrementRetryCount(id, 'Embedding generation returned null');
742:       return { success: false, error: 'Embedding returned null' };
743:     }
744: 
745:     const updateTx = db.transaction(() => {
746:       db.prepare(`
747:         UPDATE memory_index
748:         SET embedding_status = 'success',
749:             embedding_generated_at = ?,
750:             updated_at = ?,
751:             failure_reason = NULL
752:         WHERE id = ?
753:       `).run(now, now, id);
754: 
755:       try {
756:         db.prepare('DELETE FROM vec_memories WHERE rowid = ?').run(BigInt(id));
757:       } catch (_error: unknown) {
758:         // Ignore if doesn't exist
759:       }
760: 
761:       const embeddingBuffer = Buffer.from(embedding.buffer, embedding.byteOffset, embedding.byteLength);
762:       db.prepare('INSERT INTO vec_memories (rowid, embedding) VALUES (?, ?)').run(BigInt(id), embeddingBuffer);
763:     });
764: 
765:     try {
766:       updateTx();
767:       applyRetryHealthTransition(previousStatus, 'success');
768:       return { success: true, id, dimensions: embedding.length };
769:     } catch (tx_error: unknown) {
770:       // Security: raw provider errors sanitized before persistence/response
771:       console.error(`[retry-manager] Transaction error for #${id}:`, tx_error instanceof Error ? tx_error.message : String(tx_error));
772:       incrementRetryCount(id, 'EMBEDDING_PROVIDER_ERROR (provider=system, type=transaction_failed)');
773:       return { success: false, error: 'EMBEDDING_PROVIDER_ERROR (provider=system, type=transaction_failed)' };
774:     }
775:   } catch (error: unknown) {
776:     recordProviderFailure();
777:     // Security: raw provider errors sanitized before persistence/response
778:     const sanitizedMessage = sanitizeAndLogEmbeddingFailure(
779:       `[retry-manager] Unexpected retry error for #${id}`,
780:       error,
781:       { provider: null, force: true },
782:     ) ?? 'EMBEDDING_PROVIDER_ERROR (provider=unknown, type=provider_error)';
783:     incrementRetryCount(id, sanitizedMessage);
784:     return { success: false, error: sanitizedMessage };
785:   }
786: }
787: 
788: function incrementRetryCount(id: number, reason: string): void {
789:   totalRetryAttempts++;
790:   const db = vectorIndex.getDb();
791:   if (!db) return;
792: 
793:   const now = new Date().toISOString();
794:   const memory = vectorIndex.getMemory(id);
795:   if (!memory) {
796:     console.warn(`[retry-manager] Memory ${id} not found during retry count increment`);
797:     return;
798:   }
799: 
800:   const newRetryCount = (Number(memory.retry_count) || 0) + 1;
801:   // Security: raw provider errors sanitized before persistence/response
802:   const persistedReason = sanitizeEmbeddingFailureMessage(reason) ?? reason;
803:   const previousStatus = typeof memory.embedding_status === 'string'
804:     ? memory.embedding_status
805:     : typeof (memory as { embeddingStatus?: unknown }).embeddingStatus === 'string'
806:       ? (memory as { embeddingStatus?: string }).embeddingStatus ?? null
807:       : null;
808: 
809:   if (newRetryCount >= MAX_RETRIES) {
810:     markAsFailed(id, reason);
811:   } else {
812:     db.prepare(`
813:       UPDATE memory_index
814:       SET embedding_status = 'retry',
815:           retry_count = ?,
816:           last_retry_at = ?,
817:           failure_reason = ?,
818:           updated_at = ?
819:       WHERE id = ?
820:     `).run(newRetryCount, now, persistedReason, now, id);
821:     applyRetryHealthTransition(previousStatus, 'retry');
822:   }
823: }
824: 
825: function markAsFailed(id: number, reason: string): void {
826:   const db = vectorIndex.getDb();
827:   if (!db) {
828:     console.warn('[retry-manager] Database not initialized. Server may still be starting up. Cannot mark as failed.');
829:     return;
830:   }
831:   const now = new Date().toISOString();
832:   const memory = vectorIndex.getMemory(id);
833:   // Security: raw provider errors sanitized before persistence/response
834:   const persistedReason = sanitizeEmbeddingFailureMessage(reason) ?? reason;
835:   const previousStatus = memory && typeof memory.embedding_status === 'string'
836:     ? memory.embedding_status
837:     : memory && typeof (memory as { embeddingStatus?: unknown }).embeddingStatus === 'string'
838:       ? (memory as { embeddingStatus?: string }).embeddingStatus ?? null
839:       : null;
840: 
841:   db.prepare(`
842:     UPDATE memory_index
843:     SET embedding_status = 'failed',
844:         failure_reason = ?,
845:         updated_at = ?
846:     WHERE id = ?
847:   `).run(persistedReason, now, id);
848:   applyRetryHealthTransition(previousStatus, 'failed');
849: }
850: 
851: function resetForRetry(id: number): boolean {
852:   const db = vectorIndex.getDb();
853:   if (!db) return false;
854:   const now = new Date().toISOString();
855:   const memory = vectorIndex.getMemory(id);
856:   const previousStatus = memory && typeof memory.embedding_status === 'string'
857:     ? memory.embedding_status
858:     : memory && typeof (memory as { embeddingStatus?: unknown }).embeddingStatus === 'string'
859:       ? (memory as { embeddingStatus?: string }).embeddingStatus ?? null
860:       : null;
861: 
862:   const result = db.prepare(`
863:     UPDATE memory_index
864:     SET embedding_status = 'retry',
865:         retry_count = 0,
866:         last_retry_at = NULL,
867:         failure_reason = NULL,
868:         updated_at = ?
869:     WHERE id = ? AND embedding_status = 'failed'
870:   `).run(now, id);
871: 
872:   if (result.changes > 0) {
873:     applyRetryHealthTransition(previousStatus, 'retry');
874:   }
875: 
876:   return result.changes > 0;
877: }

879: /* ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
880:    5. BATCH PROCESSING
881: ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── */
882: 
883: async function processRetryQueue(limit = 3, contentLoader: ContentLoader | null = null): Promise<BatchResult> {
884:   if (shutdownRequested || retryAbortController?.signal.aborted) {
885:     return { processed: 0, succeeded: 0, failed: 0, details: [] };
886:   }
887: 
888:   const queue = getRetryQueue(limit);
889: 
890:   if (queue.length === 0) {
891:     return { processed: 0, succeeded: 0, failed: 0 };
892:   }
893: 
894:   const results: BatchResult = {
895:     processed: 0,
896:     succeeded: 0,
897:     failed: 0,
898:     details: [],
899:   };
900:   const details = results.details ?? (results.details = []);
901: 
902:   for (const memory of queue) {
903:     if (shutdownRequested || retryAbortController?.signal.aborted) {
904:       break;
905:     }
906: 
907:     // For items that have never been attempted (pending), check provider state first.
908:     // Claiming a pending item promotes it to retry, which is subject to retention pruning.
909:     // During an outage, leave pending rows as-is so they are not pruned before the drain can embed them.
910:     if (memory.embedding_status === 'pending' && isProviderCircuitOpen()) {
911:       continue;
912:     }
913: 
914:     const claim = claimRetryCandidate(memory);
915:     if (!claim.claimed) {
916:       continue;
917:     }
918: 
919:     let content: string | null = null;
920: 
921:     if (contentLoader) {
922:       content = await contentLoader(memory);
923:     } else if (typeof memory.content_text === 'string' && memory.content_text.length > 0) {
924:       // Use stored content_text — critical for chunks which share file_path with parent
925:       content = memory.content_text;
926:     } else {
927:       content = await loadContentFromFile(memory.file_path);
928:     }
929: 
930:     if (shutdownRequested || retryAbortController?.signal.aborted) {
931:       break;
932:     }
933: 
934:     if (!content) {
935:       // Count content load failure as a retry attempt to prevent infinite retry loops
936:       incrementRetryCount(memory.id, 'Content load failed: file unreadable or missing');
937:       details.push({ id: memory.id, success: false, error: 'Could not load content (counted as retry)' });
938:       results.failed++;
939:       results.processed++;
940:       continue;
941:     }
942: 
943:     const result = await retryEmbedding(memory.id, content, claim.previousStatus);
944:     results.processed++;
945: 
946:     if (result.success) {
947:       results.succeeded++;
948:     } else {
949:       results.failed++;
950:     }
951: 
952:     details.push({ id: memory.id, ...result } as RetryDetailEntry);
953:   }
954: 
955:   return results;
956: }

958: /* ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
959:    6. BACKGROUND RETRY JOB
960: ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── */
961: 
962: function startBackgroundJob(options: Partial<BackgroundJobConfig> = {}): boolean {
963:   if (backgroundJobInterval) {
964:     console.error('[retry-manager] Background job already running');
965:     return false;
966:   }
967: 
968:   const config = { ...BACKGROUND_JOB_CONFIG, ...options };
969:   shutdownRequested = false;
970:   retryAbortController = new AbortController();
971: 
972:   if (!config.enabled) {
973:     console.error('[retry-manager] Background job is disabled');
974:     return false;
975:   }
976: 
977:   console.error(`[retry-manager] Starting background retry job (interval: ${config.intervalMs}ms, batch: ${config.batchSize})`);
978: 
979:   runBackgroundJob(config.batchSize).catch((err: unknown) => {
980:     const message = err instanceof Error ? err.message : String(err);
981:     console.error('[retry-manager] Initial background job failed:', message);
982:   });
983: 
984:   backgroundJobInterval = registerInterval(() => {
985:     runBackgroundJob(config.batchSize).catch((err: unknown) => {
986:       const message = err instanceof Error ? err.message : String(err);
987:       console.error('[retry-manager] Background job iteration failed:', message);
988:     });
989:   }, config.intervalMs, { unref: true });
990: 
991:   return true;
992: }
993: 
994: function stopBackgroundJob(): boolean {
995:   shutdownRequested = true;
996:   retryAbortController?.abort();
997:   retryAbortController = null;
998:   if (!backgroundJobInterval) return false;
999: 
1000:   clearRegisteredTimer(backgroundJobInterval);
1001:   backgroundJobInterval = null;
1002:   backgroundJobRunning = false;
1003:   console.error('[retry-manager] Background retry job stopped');
1004:   return true;
1005: }
1006: 
1007: function isBackgroundJobRunning(): boolean {
1008:   return backgroundJobInterval !== null;
1009: }
1010: 
1011: async function runBackgroundJob(batchSize: number = BACKGROUND_JOB_CONFIG.batchSize): Promise<BackgroundJobResult> {
1012:   if (backgroundJobRunning) {
1013:     return { skipped: true, reason: 'Previous run still in progress' };
1014:   }
1015: 
1016:   backgroundJobRunning = true;
1017:   if (!retryAbortController || retryAbortController.signal.aborted) {
1018:     retryAbortController = new AbortController();
1019:   }
1020: 
1021:   try {
1022:     enforceRetryRetentionLimits();
1023:     if (shutdownRequested || retryAbortController.signal.aborted) {
1024:       return { skipped: true, reason: 'Shutdown requested' };
1025:     }
1026:     const stats = getRetryStats();
1027: 
1028:     if (stats.queue_size === 0) {
1029:       return { processed: 0, queue_empty: true };
1030:     }
1031: 
1032:     console.error(`[retry-manager] Background job: Processing up to ${batchSize} of ${stats.queue_size} pending embeddings`);
1033: 
1034:     const result = await processRetryQueue(batchSize);
1035: 
1036:     if (result.processed > 0) {
1037:       console.error(`[retry-manager] Background job complete: ${result.succeeded}/${result.processed} succeeded`);
1038:     }
1039: 
1040:     return result;
1041:   } catch (error: unknown) {
1042:     const message = error instanceof Error ? error.message : String(error);
1043:     console.error('[retry-manager] Background job error:', message);
1044:     return { error: message };
1045:   } finally {
1046:     lastBackgroundRunAt = new Date().toISOString();
1047:     retryHealthSnapshot.lastRun = lastBackgroundRunAt;
1048:     retryHealthSnapshot.retryAttempts = totalRetryAttempts;
1049:     retryHealthSnapshot.circuitBreakerOpen = isProviderCircuitOpen();
1050:     backgroundJobRunning = false;
1051:   }
1052: }
1053: 
1054: registerShutdownHook(() => {
1055:   stopBackgroundJob();
1056: }, { timeoutMs: 250 });

1058: /* ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
1059:    7. UTILITIES
1060: ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── */
1061: 
1062: function parseRow(row: RetryMemoryRow): RetryMemoryRow {
1063:   if (row.triggerPhrases && typeof row.triggerPhrases === 'string') {
1064:     try {
1065:       return { ...row, triggerPhrases: JSON.parse(row.triggerPhrases) };
1066:     } catch (_error: unknown) {
1067:       return { ...row, triggerPhrases: [] };
1068:     }
1069:   }
1070:   return { ...row };
1071: }
1072: 
1073: async function loadContentFromFile(filePath: string): Promise<string | null> {
1074:   try {
1075:     return await fsPromises.readFile(filePath, 'utf-8');
1076:   } catch (_error: unknown) {
1077:     return null;
1078:   }
1079: }

1081: async function claimAndRetryEmbedding(
1082:   id: number,
1083:   content: string,
1084:   expectedStatus: RetryQueueStatus = 'pending',
1085: ): Promise<RetryResult | null> {
1086:   const memory = vectorIndex.getMemory(id) as RetryMemoryRow | undefined;
1087:   if (!memory) {
1088:     return { success: false, error: 'Memory not found' };
1089:   }
1090: 
1091:   const parsedMemory = parseRow(memory);
1092:   if (getRetryStatus(parsedMemory) !== expectedStatus) {
1093:     return null;
1094:   }
1095: 
1096:   const claim = claimRetryCandidate(parsedMemory);
1097:   if (!claim.claimed) {
1098:     return null;
1099:   }
1100: 
1101:   return retryEmbedding(id, content, claim.previousStatus);
1102: }
